name: @memberjunction/ng-livekit-room
description: MemberJunction: Full-featured, framework-portable Angular LiveKit room UI — participant grid/spotlight, A/V/screen controls, data-channel chat, device pickers, active-speaker + audio meters, and a deep cancelable event model. Every feature is gated by an @Input. Works in ANY Angular app (MJ or not); the MJ binding layer (@memberjunction/ng-mj-livekit-room) wires it to the realtime bridge.
author: MemberJunction.com
